news.t: Natixis Vaughan Nelson Select ETF (VNSE) Celebrates Three Year Anniversary

holdings.infoBox: VNSE is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.37%, Alphabet at 6.95%, Eli Lilly and Company at 6.76%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.75%, and Apple at 5.21%.

overview.description: The Natixis Vaughan Nelson Select ETF (VNSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent narrow fund of US large- and mid-cap stocks that are believed to be temporarily out of favor or misunderstood. The fund utilizes the Natixis/NYSE non-transparent model. VNSE was launched on Sep 17, 2020 and is issued by Natixis.

data.title: Natixis Vaughan Nelson Select ETF (VNSE) Celebrates Three Year Anniversary
data.text: BOSTON & HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Natixis Investment Managers (Natixis IM) and Vaughan Nelson Investment Management (Vaughan Nelson), announce the three-year anniversary of the Natixis Vaughan Nelson...
